segment.source: Renders a grid of cards, one per review platform, each with optional logo, a score such as 4.8/5, a decorative five-star row, platform name, review count and a view-reviews link. Use it for: aggregated third-party ratings - Google, Trustpilot, G2 or app-store averages listed side by side as trust signals. Prefer 'Product Reviews & Ratings' for individual written reviews with text; 'Review Carousel' for rotating single reviews.
